title: Evangelion Original English Dub Cast Reunion at Delta H Con 2019
display_title: Evangelion Original English Dub Cast Reunion at Delta H Con 2019
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Original English Dub Cast Reunion at Delta H Con 2019.             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Oct 16, 2020 7:07 pm https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KqL68wSbvN4 Hour-long panel from last year. Grant, Spencer, Greenfield, Swaysey, Winn-Lee and (via skype) Keith-Shipp. Amongst Things covered: They all hate the Netflix Dub and the second 3.0 dub Swaysey and Winn-Lee did get a call from Funi to reprise for Rebuild and there were scheduling conflicts. Winn-Lee hasn't see the Rebuilds, possibly Swaysey too as at one point he thinks everyone is talking about the Netflix dub Greenfield can do a pitch-perfect Eva-01 roar on request Winn-Lee still repeats the myth that Anno did EoE out of spite to the complaining fans as truth. Some or all of them have seen Gigguk's EVAbriged series. Some stuff about the Spencer/Grant once-lost-now-found AIDS PSA. ADV fought Gainax on making the same changes to the ADV dub that Khara would insist on for the Netflix Dub/3.0 Winn-Lee went to hospital from burn-out after finishing the original dub. They still don't know what the hell is going on in the Rebuilds.

[]: Re: Evangelion Original English Dub Cast Reunion at Delta H Con 2019.             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Oct 17, 2020 12:01 pm Jayfive wrote: Amongst Things covered: They all hate the Netflix Dub and the second 3.0 dub Winn-Lee hasn't see the Rebuilds, possibly Swaysey too as at one point he thinks everyone is talking about the Netflix dub Winn-Lee still repeats the myth that Anno did EoE out of spite to the complaining fans as truth.

[]: Re: Evangelion Original English Dub Cast Reunion at Delta H Con 2019.             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Oct 20, 2020 4:12 pm Tiffany Grant seems to be the only one dropping nuggets of truth, but that's only because she speaks only of things with which she's had direct contact. (I love that AIDS PSA story.) But, yeah, I actually can't last through this video in tis entirety. I'm having to watch through it in smaller chunks. At least Matt Greenfield knows enough to rebuttal the "Anno ran out of money" myth regarding the show's ending.

[]: Re: Evangelion Original English Dub Cast Reunion at Delta H Con 2019.             Quote Post by penguintruth » Tue Oct 20, 2020 10:01 pm Jayfive wrote: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KqL68wSbvN4 Hour-long panel from last year. Grant, Spencer, Greenfield, Swaysey, Winn-Lee and (via skype) Keith-Shipp. Amongst Things covered: They all hate the Netflix Dub

[]: Re: Evangelion Original English Dub Cast Reunion at Delta H Con 2019.             Quote Post by BusterMachine4 » Wed Oct 21, 2020 6:34 am penguintruth wrote: Well, it's leagues better than theirs. Changes like having voice actors who can act?

[]: Re: Evangelion Original English Dub Cast Reunion at Delta H Con 2019.             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed Oct 21, 2020 4:27 pm That's because the Netflix dub is Gainax/Khara-mandated The ADV sounds more natural, but that's because the voice-actors were goofing about half the time. Changes like having voice actors who can act?
